articles.author: Catherine Nicholls, Laura Paddison, Issy Ronald, Zahid Mahmood, Clare Sebastian, Jen Christensen, Ivana Kottasová, Andrew Freedman, Kara Fox, David Rind, Duarte Mendonca, Joseph Ataman, Helen Regan, Taylor Ward, Mitchell McCluskey, Charlotte Reck, Ella Nilsen, Barbie Latza Nadeau, Saskya Vandoorne
articles.title: Extreme heat is melting national records across Europe, with more coming Thursday - CNN
articles.description: Punishing temperatures are scorching Europe as it swelters under a fierce heat dome, bringing dangerous conditions to swaths of the fastest-warming continent. Follow for live updates.
articles.content:
Extreme temperatures can lead to more violence, with research suggesting crimes like murder, aggravated assault and rape, terrorist attacks and mass shootings are much more likely.
Multiple studies … [+1561 chars]
